name: leios_max_vote_batch
description: EB-A (current_slot, hash=aa×32) receives a single MsgLeiosVotes batch containing exactly 1024 votes from 1024 distinct voters — the protocol maximum defined by MAX_VOTES. The batch exercises the codec path for maximum-size vote messages and the vote accumulator's ability to handle a full batch in one delivery. A conforming node must decode all 1024 votes without truncation or corruption, credit each voter exactly once, and update the running tally to 1024. Any implementation that silently truncates large batches (e.g. allocating a fixed-size buffer smaller than MAX_VOTES) would miscount the tally. The verifier should observe a VotesReceived event with count 1024 and a final tally of 1024 for EB-A.
